details.test: Task 1: Buy three different red wines with filters and add to cart
Task 2: Find wine for specific food pairing and add to cart
Task 3: Join mid-tier wine club plan as guest to review step
Task 4: Book vineyard tour with premium tasting add-on to summary
Task 5: Purchase digital gift card and start checkout
Task 6: Compare vintages and buy higher-rated vintage
Task 7: Build mixed case of organic wines and get free shipping
Task 8: Save high-scoring dessert wine to wishlist
Task 9: Read winery story and sign up for newsletter
